comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (Con anima) + Refrain. Pipeline has stacked-verse garble in m12 (8L/4n) and m13 (2L/1n). m51 gap (1n, no lyrics). Several OCR errors: merged tokens, wrong words, garbled syllables. m40-m41 'To-geth-er' misaligned but fixing cascades through m42-m43; left as comment-only for those.

10.comment: Pipeline had 'Noth ingseemsto be' (3L/5n) -- 'ingseemsto' is OCR-merged garble. Published: 'Noth-ing seems to be'.

12.comment: STACKED 8L/4n. Pipeline read interleaved v1/v2: 'that er is we're nt go our ing'. Published v1: 'that is-n't our'.

13.comment: STACKED 2L/1n. Pipeline read 'fair; a'. Published v1 on 1 note: 'fair;'.

24.comment: Pipeline had 'a' (1L/1n). Published phrase is 'Not for a year' -- the pickup note here is 'Not'.

26.comment: Pipeline had 'But ev er and a,' -- stray comma on 'a,'. Published: 'But ev-er and a' (no comma).

30.comment: Pipeline had 'tel e phone and the ,' -- stray comma+space on last token. Published: 'tel-e-phone and the'.

36.comment: Pipeline had 'But my' (2L/2n). Published: 'But, oh my dear,' -- the 2 notes carry 'But,' and 'oh'.

40.comment: Pipeline had 'To er' (2L/2n). OCR garbled second syllable. Published: 'To-geth-er' starts here; 2 notes = 'To geth'.

47.comment: Pipeline had 'They're on Iy made of' -- 'Iy' is OCR garble for 'ly'. Published: 'They're on-ly made of'.

51.comment: GAP: 1 note, no lyrics in pipeline. Published: 'to' (part of 'here to stay' in first ending).
